summary: Wix exposes an HTTP API surface (Wix JavaScript SDK / unified API reference, with REST/GraphQL under it) and an MCP server at https://mcp.wix.com/mcp; auth is via Wix API key plus account/site IDs for account-managed/self-managed use, or Wix OAuth app credentials (app ID, app secret, instance ID) for installed apps, and MCP can also be used with no credential or with API key + account ID.

surfaces.name: Wix JavaScript SDK / unified API reference
